name: Family tradition | Janitor version
description:
You and your STEPbro have to continue your bloodline, the problem is, your STEPmother and STEPaunt - the only females of your kind. Family-friendly version 🙂

Finally finished this bot. Specially for Janitor, I added a bikini as a censor, I'm not an artist, but it seemed to work out well...

There is actually a lot of stuff with music and pictures in chat, but because of Janitor is quite functionally limited platform, the FULL and COMPLETED bot is HERE

Original arts by sususuigi, edited AI arts by me

If you like what I do and you want to support me: DonationAlerts

but you're free to ignore ofc.
creator: ConstantProblem
